paper.title: Hypervelocity star candidates from Gaia DR2 and DR3 proper motions and parallaxes

review.summary: Paper searches for nearby HVS candidates using Gaia DR2 and DR3 astrometry. Contains a quality-parameter summary table (Tab_quali), a basic data table for 72 nearest extreme candidates (Tab_72dr3), and an extended quality-check table with next-neighbour and local/global comparison results (Tab_72nnflg). The combined data of the two main tables will be made available at CDS.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Summarises the DR3 quality flags, astrometric parameters, and critical thresholds used to evaluate HVS candidates, in particular the 72 nearest extreme candidates.

source_refs.caption: DR3 quality flags and parameters used for HVS candidates, in particular for the 72 nearest extreme candidates studied in Sect.~\ref{Sect_nearextrHVS}
source_refs.label: Tab_quali

columns.name: Quantity/criterion
columns.meaning: Short name of the quality parameter or selection criterion

columns.name: DR3 column
columns.meaning: Corresponding column name in the Gaia DR3 catalog

columns.name: Critical values (? among 72)
columns.meaning: Adopted threshold values and, in parentheses, the number of the 72 candidates that exceed them

columns.name: Remark
columns.meaning: Contextual note, e.g. high/low priority, unit, or section where the parameter is used

internal_tables.evidence: Single-column table in the main text listing quality criteria applied throughout the paper and in specific sections (close neighbours, local/global comparison).
internal_tables.comments: Divided into three groups: throughout-the-paper (RPlx), Sect. on close neighbours (IPDfmp, IPDfow, Solved, Dup), and Sects. on local/global comparison (Nper, e_Plx, e_pmRA, e_pmDE, gofAL, epsi, sepsi, amax, IPDgofha, RUWE).

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Basic astrometric, photometric, and kinematic data for the 72 nearest extreme HVS candidates with high (RPlx>5) and low (3<RPlx<5) priority, sorted by G magnitude.

source_refs.caption: Basic DR3 data on 72 nearest extreme HVS candidates with high ($RPlx$$>$5) and low (3$<$$RPlx$$<$5) priority, sorted by $G$ magnitude
source_refs.label: Tab_72dr3

columns.name: No.
columns.meaning: Running number of the candidate in the shortlist

columns.name: Gaia DR3
columns.meaning: Gaia Data Release 3 source identifier

columns.name: G
columns.meaning: Gaia DR3 G-band mean apparent magnitude

columns.name: Nper
columns.meaning: Number of visibility periods used in the astrometric solution

columns.name: Plx
columns.meaning: Parallax

columns.name: RPlx
columns.meaning: Parallax over parallax error (parallax significance)

columns.name: pmRA
columns.meaning: Proper motion in right ascension direction

columns.name: pmDE
columns.meaning: Proper motion in declination direction

columns.name: gofAL
columns.meaning: Astrometric goodness-of-fit in the along-scan direction

columns.name: epsi
columns.meaning: Astrometric excess noise

columns.name: sepsi
columns.meaning: Astrometric excess noise significance

columns.name: amax
columns.meaning: Astrometric sigma5d_max

columns.name: IPDgofha
columns.meaning: IPD goodness-of-fit harmonic amplitude

columns.name: RUWE
columns.meaning: Renormalised unit weight error

columns.name: G_abs
columns.meaning: Absolute G-band magnitude

columns.name: G-RP
columns.meaning: Gaia G minus RP colour

columns.name: RV
columns.meaning: Heliocentric radial velocity

columns.name: vtan
columns.meaning: Heliocentric tangential velocity computed from astrometry and distance

columns.name: vtan_g
columns.meaning: Galactocentric tangential velocity

internal_tables.evidence: Large table* listing 72 candidates with Gaia DR3 IDs, astrometric quality parameters, photometry, radial velocities, and computed tangential velocities.
internal_tables.comments: Sorted by G magnitude. High-priority (RPlx>5) and low-priority (3<RPlx<5) candidates are mixed. Some RV values are missing ('...'). Tablefoot states data will be combined with Tab_72nnflg and made available at CDS.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Presents next-neighbour search results, Image Parameter Determination (IPD) flags, and local versus global comparison ratios for astrometric quality parameters of the 72 nearest extreme HVS candidates.

source_refs.caption: DR3 next neighbours, IPD parameters, flags, and results from local$+$global parameter comparison of 72 HVS candidates
source_refs.label: Tab_72nnflg

columns.name: No.
columns.meaning: Running number corresponding to Tab_72dr3

columns.name: G
columns.meaning: G-band apparent magnitude

columns.name: Gnn
columns.meaning: G-band magnitude of the closest next neighbour

columns.name: dnn
columns.meaning: Angular separation to the closest next neighbour

columns.name: n5as
columns.meaning: Number of DR3 objects within 5 arcsec

columns.name: IPDfmp
columns.meaning: IPD frac_multi_peak flag (>0 indicates possible multiple peaks)

columns.name: IPDfow
columns.meaning: IPD frac_odd_win flag (>0 indicates odd window fraction)

columns.name: Solved
columns.meaning: Astrometric_params_solved flag (31=five-param, 95=six-param)

columns.name: Dup
columns.meaning: Duplicated_source flag (>0 indicates possible duplicate)

columns.name: Nper lDelta gDelta
columns.meaning: Visibility periods used: local Delta (deviation from local median) and global Delta (deviation from global median)

columns.name: e_Plx lR gR
columns.meaning: Parallax error: ratio to local q75 (lR) and ratio to global q75 (gR)

columns.name: e_pmRA lR gR
columns.meaning: Proper motion RA error: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: e_pmDE lR gR
columns.meaning: Proper motion DE error: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: gofAL lR gR
columns.meaning: Astrometric gofAL: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: epsi lR gR
columns.meaning: Astrometric excess noise: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: sepsi lR gR
columns.meaning: Astrometric excess noise significance: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: amax lR gR
columns.meaning: Astrometric sigma5d_max: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: IPDgofha lR gR
columns.meaning: IPD GOF harmonic amplitude: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: RUWE lR gR
columns.meaning: RUWE: ratio to local q75 and global q75

columns.name: RPlx
columns.meaning: Parallax over parallax error

internal_tables.evidence: Large table* with 20 logical columns presenting next-neighbour information, IPD flags, and local/global comparison ratios for quality parameters of the 72 candidates.
internal_tables.comments: Columns with 'lR gR' suffix contain pairs of ratios: local ratio (target value divided by the 0.75 quantile of a local comparison sample) and global ratio (same using a global comparison sample). Tablefoot states data will be combined with Tab_72dr3 and made available at CDS.

external_resources.description: The combined data from Tables Tab_72dr3 and Tab_72nnflg will be made available in electronic form at the CDS (Centre de Donnees astronomiques de Strasbourg).

source_refs.context: The data in Tables~\ref{Tab_72dr3} and \ref{Tab_72nnflg} will be combined and made available in electronic form at the CDS.
The data in Tables~\ref{Tab_72dr3} and \ref{Tab_72nnflg} will be combined and made available in electronic form at the CDS.

external_resources.evidence: Explicitly stated in tablefoots of both Tab_72dr3 and Tab_72nnflg.
external_resources.comments: No specific CDS identifier or DOI given in the arXiv preprint. Not downloaded during review or extraction.
